name: nodus-plugin
description: Helper skills, commands, rules, and agents for installing, inspecting, and maintaining Nodus packages.

interface.longDescription: Install, inspect, sync, and review Nodus packages directly from Codex using the package content already shipped in this repository.
defaultPrompt: Install a Nodus package for Codex in this repo.
Inspect this Nodus package before I add it.
Sync this workspace and verify Nodus is healthy.
